value: Phase 0-3 complete and signed off. Phase 4 (Matrix Client Facade) in progress - coder-rust building MatrixClient wrapping matrix-sdk 0.16 with E2EE. Team: lead (active), coder-rust (active on Phase 4), coder-npm (shut down, respawn for Phase 7). Key insight: FederatedPair uses .localhost TLD + openssl self-signed certs, no mkcert needed.
